ddls:
CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the template */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator who last edited the template */,
  "annotated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was last edited */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the template belongs */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain to which the template belongs */,
  "edited_since_last_training" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the template has been edited since the last training session */,
  "content" TEXT /* Additional content associated with the template, such as buttons or images */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the template is currently active and can be used by the chatbot */,
  "last_training_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last training session the template was used in */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the template has been used by the chatbot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotators" (
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotator */,
  "annotator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the annotator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the annotator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the annotator (e.g., lead annotator, junior annotator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the annotator belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the annotator */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the annotator logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the domain is currently active and can be used by the chatbot */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the domain was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template version */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the template */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the template version */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator who created the version */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version has been approved for use */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the training session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_training" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the template for the training session */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was approved for the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id", "session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_training_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)
